_comment: Definitive LSZG full-pattern regression test. Pins the complete round-trip Ground -> Tower -> Pattern -> Land -> Ground -> Parking with expect_state assertions on every step. Mirrors a verified live session at LSZG Grenchen (runway 06, calm wind). Includes the wait_sec for the on_airborne auto-correction (DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> PATTERN_ENTRY) that flow_01 did not exercise. Replaces flow_01_eu_pattern_grenchen.json (strict subset).
name: Definitive LSZG full pattern (Ground -> Tower -> Pattern -> Land -> Ground -> Parking)
